siteName: Shaney Hansen Photography & Social Media Management
tagline: Photography and social media storytelling for people, brands, teams and moments worth sharing.
positioning: A South African-based visual storytelling brand offering warm photography, creative direction, styled set design and social media management for local and international clients.
footerLine: Warm, story-led photography, creative direction and social media storytelling for weddings, families, schools, corporates, teams and destination lifestyle moments.
availabilityLine: Available for selected local, destination and international projects
travelNote: Travel, destination and international projects are quoted individually.
